proposals.title: Add preflight filesystem-read health check
proposals.description: Run a startup check that verifies read access to journal, positions, and observations paths before analysis, and fail fast with actionable diagnostics.
proposals.expected_impact: Prevents silent analysis gaps and reduces missed daily reviews.

proposals.title: Create fallback reflection mode
proposals.description: When files are unavailable, automatically emit a structured incident reflection template and queue a retry once access is restored.
proposals.expected_impact: Maintains continuity in the review cycle and preserves accountability.

proposals.title: Cache end-of-day snapshot artifacts
proposals.description: Persist a compact daily snapshot (positions, realized/unrealized PnL, sector attribution) in a single resilient file for reflection use.
proposals.expected_impact: Improves robustness and speeds up daily synthesis even during partial outages.
